/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_du_high_adapters.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_du_high_adapters.dir/du_test_mode_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_du_high_adapters.dir/f1c_du_test_mode_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_du_high_adapters.dir/mac_test_mode_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_du_high_adapters.dir/mac_test_mode_helpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_du_high_adapters.dir/mac_test_mode_ue_repository.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_du_high_adapters.a
